visual_description: A nighttime city street with wet pavement reflects streetlights as a dark car maneuvers and people gather near a white vehicle. The scene shifts to a dimly lit building entrance marked with Chinese characters where two police officers walk past a truck. A close‑up shows a man with spiky hair in a leather jacket looking downward.
audio_description: Ambient night sounds are audible, including distant traffic and faint murmurs.
